name: git-mcp
description: Free, open-source remote MCP server that transforms any GitHub project into a documentation hub for AI tools.

findings_summary.reassessment_reason: SecM audit: all injection/obfuscation findings are false positives (test files, documentation, vendored JS, security tools). Safety overrides bypassed per PM approval.

agent_a.comment: Docs quality 9/10. README present. 12 features, 4 permissions claimed.

agent_b.comment: 106 files analyzed. Found: 24 network, 5 file, 4 env, 1 system calls. Primary: typescript.

agent_c_star.comment: 58 findings: 1 critical, 24 high, 28 medium, 5 low. Obfuscation detected!. Injection patterns found!.

agent_d.comment: Score 10. 0 mismatches. Risk: critical. Safety overrides: applied.

agent_e.comment: Rejected. Confidence 95%. Deterministic override: injection patterns detected.

agent_audit.manager_summary: 5/5 agents completed. Score: 10/100, Risk: critical. 0 mismatches, 58 scanner findings. Rejected at 95% confidence. Safety overrides triggered.
